insight: Integrate multiple first-party data sources (GA4, Search Console, GBP, site crawls) into AI systems to uncover high-ROI content gaps and prioritize efforts based on real performance data.
quote: It connected their brand positioning, trust signals, and search performance data.

insight: Shift AI from a recommendation layer to an execution layer—use it to directly update, optimize, and deploy content to eliminate revision bottlenecks.
quote: Less AI that only suggests, more AI that helps execute.

insight: Adopt a rapid iteration workflow: publish AI-assisted 'minimum viable' pages quickly, get them indexed, and improve them continuously based on rankings and data.
quote: Get it crawled, indexed, ranking… then keep improving it.

insight: Treat all AI-generated content as a first draft and build structured iteration loops (editing, enrichment, validation) before aiming for top rankings.
quote: This is always a first draft… you're going to have to iterate.

insight: Provide detailed inputs (product info, positioning, entities, constraints) when prompting AI to significantly improve topical relevance and conversion alignment.
quote: Give it as much raw material as possible.

insight: Ensure all AI-generated pages are rendered in clean, crawlable HTML (not JS-heavy) so search engines and LLMs can properly interpret and index the content.
quote: Otherwise it's basically a blank page to crawlers.

insight: Use AI to automate technical SEO at scale—schema generation, internal linking, sitemaps, and directives—to accelerate deployment across large content sets.
quote: You can build internal links, sitemaps, and directives with simple prompts.

insight: Re-optimize content using AI with NLP-driven competitor analysis to systematically cover missing entities, topics, and sections required for ranking.
quote: It will rework that entire page to cover those topics.

insight: Prioritize ranking in traditional search results, as visibility there directly increases the probability of being cited in AI-generated answers.
Actively control your brand narrative by using AI to audit and fix inconsistencies across all web properties, ensuring accurate and consistent retrieval by LLMs.
quote: Find every single thing about your brand and correct it.
